title_en: Battle of the Sauces: Homemade vs. Jarred
title_es: La Batalla de las Salsas: Casera vs. Envasada
hook_en: You won't believe which sauce has more sugar than a cookie!
hook_es: ¡No vas a creer qué salsa tiene más azúcar que una galleta!
key_message: Homemade tomato sauce is healthier, with no hidden sugars or additives.
visual_elements: split-screen of jarred sauce ingredient list
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Homemade tomato sauce (tomatoes, garlic, basil, olive oil) vs. PROCESSED: Jarred pasta sauce (added sugar, soybean oil, natural flavors) — Some jarred sauces have more sugar per serving than chocolate cookies

title_en: Tomato Sauce Face-Off: Real vs. Fake
title_es: Cara a Cara de Salsas de Tomate: Real vs. Falsa
hook_en: Real tomatoes vs. mystery ingredients — which would you choose?
hook_es: Tomates reales vs. ingredientes misteriosos — ¿cuál elegirías?
key_message: Jarred sauces often contain unhealthy additives and hidden sugars.
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Homemade tomato sauce (tomatoes, garlic, basil, olive oil) vs. PROCESSED: Jarred pasta sauce (added sugar, soybean oil, natural flavors) — Some jarred sauces have more sugar per serving than chocolate cookies
